verses.text: Pasian aw, nangma itna kip om bangin kei hong hehpih in la, na hehpihna lian om bangin ka thu palsatnate hong phiatkhiatsak in
Ka khialhna panin hong silsiang kiuhkeuh in la, ka mawhna panin kei hong siangsak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thupalsatnate ka thei a, ka mawhnate khempeuh ka phawk ngitnget hi
Nangma tungah khialin, nangma muhna-ah a sia ka gamta khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na thugenna-ah nang na thutang a, thu na hong khenna-ah pauna ding bangmah omlo hi
A khialsa mahin kei ka suak a, ka nu in a gil sungah hong paii tunga kipan a mawhsa ka hi hi
Nang in nuntakna sungah thumanna na deih hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka lungsim tawngah ciimna hong hilh in
Puknah tawh hong nul in; kei ka siang ding hi. Hong sil in; vuk sangin ka ngozaw ding hi
Lungdamna leh kipahna kei tungah hong pia in la, na hong sukgawp mipa hong lungdamsak in
Ka mawhna khempeuh na mai panin seel in la, ka khialhna khempeuh hong phiatkhiatsak in
Pasian aw, keima sungah lungsim siangtho hong piangsak in la, a thak a man ngaihsutna ka sungah hong guan' in
Nangma omna panin kei hong paiikhia kei in la, keima kiang panin na kha siangtho lakhia kei in
Nong hotkhiatna hangin hong lungdamsak kik in la, utna lungsim tawh keimah hong huh ta in
Tua ciangin thupalsatte na zia na tong ka hilh ding a, nangma lamah mimawhte hong kiheikik ding uh hi
Kei a hong hon Pasian aw, sihna ding panin kei hong honkhia in. Nong hotkhiatna thu lungdam takin ka sa ding hi
Topa aw, ka pau theihna dingin kei hong huh in; nangmah ka hong phat ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing tawh biakna na deih kei hi. Meihal biakna hong pia hita leng zong, na lungdam kei ding hi
Pasian' san' theih biakna pen lungsim kitamzan ahi hi. Pasian aw, a kitamzan, a kisik lungsim na simmawh kei ding hi
Na lungkimna pha tawh Zion tungah a pha bawl in la, Jerusalem kulhpite ciangkik ta in
Tua ciangin biakpiakna man, meihal biakna leh meihal biakpiakna bupah na lungkim ding a, na biakna tau tungah bawngtalte hong kipia ding hi.
